prestazioni: Engine swap to a **C20XE 16V 'Red Top'** (2.0L I4, 150hp stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.63 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) on a **custom tubular manifold** by *Schmidt Motorsport*, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** and **Sard R2 760cc/min fuel injectors** for a target of 350hp at 1.5 bar boost on **98 RON fuel**.

Full **dry-sump lubrication system** by *Moroso* (PN 22100) with a **4-stage pump** and **aluminum oil pan** (custom-machined by *Irmscher Motorsport*) to prevent oil starvation during high-G cornering, paired with a **Setrab 50-row oil cooler** (PN 50-20001) and **Motul 300V 10W-60** racing oil.

Custom **6-speed sequential gearbox** by *Hewland LD200* (FWD-specific, straight-cut gears) with a **Peloquin LSD** (40% lockup) and **AP Racing CP5250 twin-plate clutch**, mated to a **Quaife ATB differential** (2.1 final drive ratio) for optimal power delivery. Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV dampers** (Vectra B-specific valving), **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (-30mm drop), and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar** (24mm, 3-position).
estetica: Full **Irmscher Evo 6 widebody kit** (fiberglass, OEM-fitment) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (3D-scanned from a *Vectra Super Touring* race car) and **rear diffuser** by *Aeroflow Dynamics*, featuring **integrated tow hooks** and **DTM-style gurney flaps**.

Custom **18x9.5 ET25 front / 18x10.5 ET30 rear** wheels by *BBS CH-R* (gold finish, 5x110 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) with **custom center-lock adapters** (converted from 5x110 to 5x120 for motorsport hubs).

Interior stripped and fitted with a **Sparco Pro 2000 seat** (FIA 8855-1999 certified) in *Alcantara/red stitching*, **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, and a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (320mm, suede) on a **NRG quick-release hub**. Full **custom roll cage** by *Safety Devices* (FIA-spec, 6-point, bolt-in) with **carbon fiber door cards** (retaining OEM Irmscher trim) and **AEM CD-7 dash display** (replacing the stock cluster).
